name: Rossum
description: Rossum — AI-first intelligent document processing for invoices, POs, and receipts. Auto-extracts data with no templates, integrates into ERP workflows.

seo.title: Rossum — Data Integration / ETL / Reverse ETL
seo.meta_description: Rossum: Rossum — AI-first intelligent document processing for invoices, POs, and receipts. Auto-extracts data with no templates, integrates into ERP workflows.

when_to_use: AI-first invoice and PO data extraction without fixed templates
Intelligent document processing for accounts payable teams
Structured data capture from varied document layouts via API
Reducing manual document processing in logistics and finance

pros: Template-free AI extraction adapts to new layouts
High accuracy on invoices and receipts out of the box
Validation UI speeds up human-in-the-loop review
Prebuilt ERP connectors (SAP, NetSuite, MS Dynamics)
cons: Pricing opaque and steep for low document volumes
Accuracy drops on non-invoice document types
Custom fields still require training data
Lock-in to Rossum's annotation UI and schema
review.verdict: Strong template-free IDP for AP automation, but priced for enterprise and overkill for occasional OCR needs.
review.best_for: Mid-market to enterprise AP teams automating high-volume invoice and PO processing
review.not_for: Startups needing cheap OCR or teams processing under 10k documents per year

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Custom/contact sales alone is not peak-lock evidence
